---
title: "About"
image: hamid1.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/adehamid
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/hamid-adesokan-03258217/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/aadehamid

---

About this blog
